call_inputs.name: patientData
call_inputs.description: Patient registration details including name, contact, and unique identifier

call_outputs.name: registrationResult
call_outputs.description: JSON with success status, patient ID, and message

internal_leaf_accesses.description: Write new patient record and check for uniqueness

call_inputs.name: appointmentRequest
call_inputs.description: JSON with patient ID, date, time, and doctor details

call_outputs.name: appointmentResult
call_outputs.description: JSON with success status, appointment ID, and message

internal_leaf_accesses.description: Check slot availability and store new appointment

call_outputs.name: recordsResult
call_outputs.description: JSON with success status, records data, and message

call_inputs.name: profileUpdate
call_inputs.description: JSON with patient ID and fields to update (e.g., name, contact)

call_outputs.name: updateResult
call_outputs.description: JSON with success status, updated profile, and message

internal_leaf_accesses.description: Read current profile and write updated fields
